message:
refactor(mux): deduplicate broadcast helpers and use switch dispatch

- Replace broadcastPanelCreated/Closed/Bell with single broadcastPanelMsg
- Replace 6 boolean state broadcast/send functions with broadcastBoolState/sendBoolState helpers
- Convert handleBinaryControlMessageFromClient from if-else-if chain to switch
- Simplify double @min(@as(..., @intCast(@min(...)))) casts to @intCast(@min(...))
